question_title: Will LRCX's market close price on 2026-04-25 be higher than its market close price on 2026-04-15?
summary: LRCX stock direction over 7 trading days (Apr 15 close of $263.15 vs Apr 24 close, since Apr 25 is Saturday). The dominant catalyst is LRCX earnings on April 22 after close. The company beat estimates last quarter, 19 analysts revised estimates upward, and the semiconductor sector is at all-time highs with strong AI infrastructure demand. Earnings-scenario Monte Carlo (65% beat, 20% meet, 15% miss) yields 58.3% probability of being higher. Zero-drift baseline is 50.2%. Conditional returns after 5%+ single-day spikes are 51.8% positive. Bearish offsets include stretched valuation (P/E ~50x), significant insider selling, and today's 3.4% pullback. Final estimate of 57% reflects the positive earnings skew moderated by valuation concerns.

factors.description: Zero-drift Monte Carlo baseline with earnings vol: 50.2% - essentially coin flip without directional bias
Earnings on April 22 (within horizon): LRCX beat last quarter, analysts project strong Q3 ($1.35 EPS, $5.70B rev), 19 analysts revised upward. Expected positive earnings surprise adds positive drift
Broad market at 52-week high (S&P 500 at 7024), semiconductor sector hitting all-time highs with strong AI demand
Stock dropped 3.4% today from near ATH - starting from a lower comparison price after pullback
Conditional returns after 5%+ single-day spike: only 51.8% positive over 8 days - recent surge may be largely priced in
Insider selling (CFO sold $11M in March), elevated valuation (P/E ~50x), stock up 50% YTD - potential for profit-taking
Earnings-scenario Monte Carlo with 65% beat probability yields 58.3% chance of price being higher

reasoning:
**Forecast: 57% probability LRCX closes higher on April 25 than April 15**

Key reasoning:

- **Baseline**: Zero-drift Monte Carlo over 7 trading days gives ~50% (coin flip)
- **Earnings catalyst (dominant factor)**: LRCX reports Q3 earnings on **April 22 after close** — within the forecast window. The company beat estimates last quarter, 19 analysts have revised estimates upward, and consensus expects $1.35 EPS / $5.70B revenue. This tilts the distribution positively.
- **Sector momentum**: Semiconductors are at all-time highs driven by AI infrastructure spending; S&P 500 is at its 52-week high
- **Offsetting risks**: Stretched valuation (P/E ~50x), significant insider selling ($11M by CFO in March), and post-spike conditional returns showing only 51.8% positive
- **Earnings-scenario Monte Carlo** (65% beat / 20% meet / 15% miss) yields **58.3%** probability of being higher; sensitivity range is 53-63% across reasonable beat probabilities
- Final estimate of **57%** balances the positive earnings skew against valuation and mean-reversion concerns
resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the latest market close price of LRCX. If it is higher than the close price on 2026-04-15, the question will resolve to 'Yes'. The close price will be pulled from the Yahoo Finance API.
fine_print: Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
